name: cast
description: Persona casting agent for rapid generation, persistence, lifecycle management, and inter-agent sync. Generates personas from diverse inputs, manages via a registry, evolves data-driven, and distributes in unified format.

capabilities.summary: Generate personas from README, docs, code, tests, analytics, feedback, or agent handoffs
Centralized registry management at .agents/personas/registry.yaml with lifecycle states
Data-driven persona updates from Trace, Voice, Pulse, Researcher evidence
Freshness, duplication, coverage, and Echo compatibility evaluation
Adapter-specific packaging for downstream agents (Echo, Spark, Retain, Compete, Accord)
TTS-based persona voice generation with engine selection and fallback
Evidence-based confidence with source weights, validation tiers, and decay rules
Stated-vs-actual behavior comparison with per-attribute validation scores
